title: Valid Anagram
description:
Given two strings `s` and `t`, return `True` if `t` is an anagram of `s`, and `False` otherwise.

An anagram is a word or phrase formed by rearranging the letters of a different word or phrase, using all the original letters exactly once.
constraints: s and t consist of lowercase English letters

hint_plan.level_1: Anagrams have identical character counts when lengths match.
hint_plan.level_2: Compare frequency tables or sorted tuples of characters.
hint_plan.level_3: If lengths differ, return false early; otherwise count letters for both strings and compare.
hint_plan.level_4: Use a dict or collections.Counter; ensure counts for every character match between s and t.

canonical_solution_summary: Count characters in both strings (or sort) and compare; short-circuit on length mismatch.
